# gori

> Sit in the loop. A fast, keyboard-driven HTTP intercepting proxy and web-hacking toolkit for the terminal.

## Pages

- [Gori - Hack from the terminal](https://gori.hahwul.com/): Sit in the loop. A fast, keyboard-driven HTTP intercepting proxy and web-hacking toolkit for the terminal.
- [Gori - Hack from the terminal](https://gori.hahwul.com/ko/): 고리 안에 머무르세요. 터미널을 위한 빠르고 키보드 중심의 HTTP 인터셉트 프록시이자 웹 해킹 툴킷.

## Getting Started

- [AI Setup](https://gori.hahwul.com/getting-started/ai-setup/): Connect an AI agent to gori over MCP: install the server into your client, pin the project, and drive your first request.
- [Configuration](https://gori.hahwul.com/getting-started/configuration/): Where gori stores data, how to configure the network, and the root CA.
- [Installation](https://gori.hahwul.com/getting-started/installation/): Install gori via curl, Homebrew, the AUR, Docker, a pre-built binary, or from source.
- [Quick Start](https://gori.hahwul.com/getting-started/quick-start/): A hands-on walkthrough: trust the CA, capture a real request, inspect it, and replay it in Repeater.
- [AI 설정](https://gori.hahwul.com/ko/getting-started/ai-setup/): MCP로 AI 에이전트를 gori에 연결합니다: 클라이언트에 서버 설치, 프로젝트 고정, 그리고 첫 요청 구동.
- [설정](https://gori.hahwul.com/ko/getting-started/configuration/): gori가 데이터를 저장하는 위치, 네트워크 설정 방법, 그리고 루트 CA를 다룹니다.
- [설치](https://gori.hahwul.com/ko/getting-started/installation/): curl, Homebrew, AUR, Docker, 사전 빌드 바이너리, 또는 소스에서 gori를 설치합니다.
- [Quick Start](https://gori.hahwul.com/ko/getting-started/quick-start/): 직접 따라 하는 튜토리얼: CA를 신뢰하고, 실제 요청을 캡처해 살펴본 뒤 Repeater에서 재전송합니다.

## Guide

- [Decoder](https://gori.hahwul.com/guide/decoder/): Encode, decode, hash, and transform data in a multi-step pipeline inside the TUI.
- [Hotkeys](https://gori.hahwul.com/guide/hotkeys/): Rebind gori's keyboard shortcuts from the Preferences modal.
- [JWT](https://gori.hahwul.com/guide/jwt/): Decode, edit and re-sign JSON Web Tokens, and generate alg:none, weak-secret, and header-injection payloads.
- [MCP Server](https://gori.hahwul.com/guide/mcp/): Drive gori from an AI agent or script over the Model Context Protocol.
- [OAST](https://gori.hahwul.com/guide/oast/): Catch out-of-band callbacks (interactsh & friends) to confirm blind SSRF, XXE, and injection.
- [Proxy & History](https://gori.hahwul.com/guide/proxy/): Capture traffic, intercept requests, scope your target, and inspect every protocol.
- [Repeater & Fuzzer](https://gori.hahwul.com/guide/repeater-and-fuzzer/): The request workbench and the Intruder-style fuzzer, in the TUI and headless.
- [Scanning & Issues](https://gori.hahwul.com/guide/scanning/): The Probe scanner, the Param Miner, and triaging results into Issues.
- [Sequencer](https://gori.hahwul.com/guide/sequencer/): Grade the randomness of session tokens, CSRF tokens, and reset codes for predictability.
- [Settings](https://gori.hahwul.com/guide/settings/): The Preferences modal: one place for every gori setting, reachable from anywhere.
- [Themes](https://gori.hahwul.com/guide/themes/): Switch between gori's built-in colour themes, or drop in your own.
- [Decoder](https://gori.hahwul.com/ko/guide/decoder/): TUI 안에서 다단계 파이프라인으로 데이터를 인코드, 디코드, 해시, 변환합니다.
- [단축키](https://gori.hahwul.com/ko/guide/hotkeys/): Preferences 모달에서 gori의 단축키를 재지정합니다.
- [JWT](https://gori.hahwul.com/ko/guide/jwt/): JSON Web Token을 디코드, 편집, 재서명하고 alg:none, weak-secret, header-injection 페이로드를 생성합니다.
- [MCP 서버](https://gori.hahwul.com/ko/guide/mcp/): Model Context Protocol을 통해 AI 에이전트나 스크립트로 gori를 구동합니다.
- [OAST](https://gori.hahwul.com/ko/guide/oast/): out-of-band 콜백(interactsh 등)을 잡아 blind SSRF, XXE, injection을 확인하세요.
- [프록시 & History](https://gori.hahwul.com/ko/guide/proxy/): 트래픽을 캡처하고, 요청을 인터셉트하고, 대상을 스코프로 좁히고, 모든 프로토콜을 살펴봅니다.
- [Repeater & Fuzzer](https://gori.hahwul.com/ko/guide/repeater-and-fuzzer/): 요청 워크벤치와 Intruder 스타일 Fuzzer를, TUI와 헤드리스에서 다룹니다.
- [스캐닝 & Issues](https://gori.hahwul.com/ko/guide/scanning/): Probe 스캐너, Param Miner, 그리고 결과를 Issues로 트리아지하기.
- [Sequencer](https://gori.hahwul.com/ko/guide/sequencer/): 세션 token, CSRF token, 리셋 코드의 무작위성을 예측 가능성 관점에서 등급 매기기.
- [설정](https://gori.hahwul.com/ko/guide/settings/): Preferences 모달: gori의 모든 설정을 한곳에서, 어디서나.
- [테마](https://gori.hahwul.com/ko/guide/themes/): gori의 내장 컬러 테마를 전환하거나, 직접 만든 테마를 넣습니다.

## Reference

- [CLI 레퍼런스](https://gori.hahwul.com/ko/reference/cli/): 모든 gori 서브커맨드와 커맨드라인 플래그.
- [설정](https://gori.hahwul.com/ko/reference/config/): settings.json 키와 GORI_HOME 저장소 레이아웃.
- [쿼리 언어](https://gori.hahwul.com/ko/reference/query-language/): History, Sitemap, Probe, Issues, Intercept, MCP 도구 전반에서 쓰는 필터 문법.
- [CLI Reference](https://gori.hahwul.com/reference/cli/): Every gori subcommand and command-line flag.
- [Configuration](https://gori.hahwul.com/reference/config/): The settings.json keys and the GORI_HOME storage layout.
- [Query Language](https://gori.hahwul.com/reference/query-language/): The filter syntax used across History, Sitemap, Probe, Issues, Intercept, and the MCP tools.
